method_summary: Develops a low-rank model for task-model ability matrix estimation with a max-norm accurate estimator combining convex initialization and alternating-minimization refinement, plus an uncertainty quantification framework for task-specific ranking using cross-fitted one-step debiased estimators.
key_innovation: Uncertainty quantification framework for task-specific ranking with asymptotically valid confidence intervals that attain the semiparametric efficiency bound.
title: Low Rank for Rank: Uncertainty-Aware Task-Specific LLM Ranking under Sparse Pairwise Comparisons
